012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
022
023/**
024 * Subclass of {@link Serializer} for byte-based serializers.
025 *
026 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
027 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
028 * </ul>
029 *
030 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
031 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/SerializersAndParsers">Serializers and Parsers</a>
032
033 * </ul>
034 */
035@SuppressWarnings({
036   "java:S115" // ARG_xxx constants use camelCase after prefix intentionally (constructor arg name keys, not enum-style constants)
037})
038public class OutputStreamSerializer extends Serializer {
039
040   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
041
042   /**
043    * Builder class.
044    */
045   @SuppressWarnings({
046      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
047   })
048   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends Serializer.Builder<SELF> {
049
050      /**
051       * Constructor, default settings.
052       */
053      protected Builder() {}
054
055      /**
056       * Copy constructor.
057       *
058       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
059       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
060       */
061      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
062         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
063      }
064
065      /**
066       * Copy constructor.
067       *
068       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
069       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
070       */
071      protected Builder(OutputStreamSerializer copyFrom) {
072         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
073      }
074
075      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
076      public OutputStreamSerializer build() {
077         return build(OutputStreamSerializer.class);
078      }
079
080      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
081      public abstract SELF copy();
082
083
084   }
085
086   /**
087    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link OutputStreamSerializer#create()} / {@link OutputStreamSerializer#copy()} path.
088    */
089   @SuppressWarnings({
090      "java:S110" // Inheritance depth follows the serializer builder chain; intentional layered design
091   })
092   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
093
094      DefaultBuilder() {}
095
096      DefaultBuilder(OutputStreamSerializer copyFrom) {
097         super(copyFrom);
098      }
099
100      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
101         super(copyFrom);
102      }
103
104      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
105      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
106         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
107      }
108   }
109
110   /**
111    * Creates a new builder for this object.
112    *
113    * @return A new builder.
114    */
115   @SuppressWarnings({
116      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
117   })
118   public static Builder<?> create() {
119      return new DefaultBuilder();
120   }
121
122   /**
123    * Constructor.
124    *
125    * @param builder
126    *    The builder for this object.
127    */
128   protected OutputStreamSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
129      super(builder);
130   }
131
132   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
133   public OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
134      return OutputStreamSerializerSession.create(this);
135   }
136
137   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
138   public OutputStreamSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
139
140   @Override /* Overridden from Serializer */
141   public final boolean isWriterSerializer() { return false; }
142
143   /**
144    * Convenience method for serializing an object to a <code><jk>byte</jk></code>.
145    *
146    * @param o The object to serialize.
147    * @return The output serialized to a byte array.
148    * @throws SerializeException If a problem occurred trying to convert the output.
149    */
150   @Override
151   public final byte[] serialize(Object o) throws SerializeException {
152      return getSession().serialize(o);
153   }
154
155   /**
156    * Binary output format.
157    *
158    * <p>
159    * Resolves from the configured {@link MarshallingContext#getBinaryFormat()}.
160    *
161    * @return The binary wire format used by this serializer.
162    */
163   protected final BinaryFormat getBinaryFormat() { return getMarshallingContext().getBinaryFormat(); }
164}
